news.title: Here's the inflation breakdown for April 2026 — in one chart
news.summary: The Iran war has pushed up gasoline, groceries and other prices for consumers. The war has also pushed up the cost of living for many in the United States.

news.title: It's not just Iran and oil raising inflation. Prices also are reaccelerating in these other areas
news.summary: Prices are rising fast for consumers. Here's some of the places where prices are rising quickly for consumers in the U.S. and around the world.

news.title: EBay rejects GameStop's $56 billion takeover bid, calling it 'neither credible nor attractive'
news.summary: Many analysts questioned the deal, citing concerns about how GameStop would finance the transaction and the strategic rationale. The deal is expected to close by the end of the year.

news.title: Novo Nordisk says high-dose Wegovy helped some patients lose nearly 28% of their weight
news.summary: Novo Nordisk releases new data that could help boost the case for the higher dose version of its blockbuster obesity injection Wegovy. Novo Nordisk released new data.

news.title: AI super rally has retail investors acting the most aggressive since trading frenzy during Covid
news.summary: Retail traders are buying calls in Cboe's "Mag 10" stocks at the heaviest 10-day clip since 2021. The big seven plus AMD, Palantir and Broadcom are included in the list.

news.title: Social Security’s COLA could rise in 2027, boosted by Iran war impact and inflation
news.summary: The cost-of-living adjustment is expected to be higher this year. Gas and energy prices have pushed up the cost of living adjustment.

news.title: My retirement fund is like an AI version of me. It keeps working when I’m not able to.
news.summary: “Not taking care of your money becomes, in a visceral sense, not taking Care of yourself,” he says. “NotTaking care of Your Money’s” is available on CNN.com.

news.title: What to know about investing in SpaceX — or any company — before it goes public
news.summary: IPOs generate a lot of excitement. Make sure your expectations are informed — and realistic. IPOs are a great way to make money, but be realistic about your expectations.

news.title: BuzzFeed’s stock more than doubles as beleaguered media company gets a lifeline
news.summary: The company says film and television producer Byron Allen’s family office has agreed to take a majority stake. The company says the deal is expected to close in the next few months.

news.title: ‘She is very angry with me’: My daughter, 30, has issues with drugs. Should I take half the profit from the sale of her house?
news.summary: “My thought is to invest it on her behalf for someday, when she gets her life together,” he says. “My idea is to investment it on my behalf for some time to come.”
